title: stenandrium tuberosum
intro: Stenandrium tuberosum, also known as the 'tuberous stenandrium', is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Stenandrium tuberosum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies.
